scene_attributes: small wooden side table with decor
area rug in front of fireplace
payload.additional_notes: Glossy wall-mounted TV reflects scene. Sliding glass door at right with vertical blinds; symmetric curtains around windows. Small decorative items on mantel and side table.
payload.image_summary: A living room centered on a fireplace with a wall-mounted TV above it. A dark leather couch/recliner sits to the right, a small wooden side table to the left, windows and a sliding door with blinds and curtains provide natural light. A plant sits on the mantel and a rug lies in front of the fireplace.
